notes: Phase B re-run after user signed in to CBS in Chrome.
League host moved from cbssports.com/fantasy/baseball/league/* to dpf.baseball.cbssports.com — scrape_cbs.py has dpf2026.baseball.cbssports.com hardcoded which is dead.

TXNS source switched to /transactions?print_rows=9999 (one URL, all 209 rows uncapped) instead of per-team /transactions/{id}/all_but_lineup which CBS truncates to ~30 rows. Authoritative file replaces (not merges) cbs_transactions.json so stale phantom rows can age out — fixed an Andy-Pages-3/21-Dropped phantom that had been propagating via merge_tx.py for days.
roster_sync.py NOT run this pass — print-all view is uncapped, so we no longer need synthetic-add backfills; doing so would have generated 312 fake adds.
Draft URL: /draft/results — confirmed data/cbs_picks_full.json (372 picks, 60 keepers) matches the live draft room exactly; no refresh needed.
fetch_stuffplus.py ran but pybaseball not installed in sandbox; non-fatal.
